description: Integration bridge connecting The-Curriculum-of-Everything-Earth to Rosetta-Shape-Core. The curriculum IS a living ontology — cross-disciplinary modules map to shape families, nature teachers map to entity archetypes, age tiers map to growth states.

mappings.notes: Each module explores patterns, waves, networks, or geometric thinking — these map to icosahedral families (resonance, flow, information, geometry).
Subject-specific curricula align with dodecahedral principles — symmetry (math), conservation (physics), resonance (music), transformation (language).
The framework is the tetrahedral foundation — 4 faces = fire, stability, foundation, boundary. Pedagogy starts here.
The Teacher-dataset catalogs nature teachers that ARE ontology entities. Bee teaches swarm coordination (CAP.SWARM_COORDINATION), spider teaches web topology (STRUCT.WEB).
Age 3-5 = seed (narrative, sensory). Age 6-8 = sprout (hands-on discovery). Age 9-12 = branch (scientific methodology). Same growth model as bloom.py.
The interactive tool translates scientific concepts into nature-inspired lessons — a pedagogical encoder.

cross_bridge_connections.connection: Nature teachers in the curriculum ARE entries in the Living Intelligence Database. Same archetypes, different encoding.
Pattern modules teach fractal thinking — self-similarity across scales. Same lens as Fractal-Compass-Atlas.
Physics curriculum grounded in the same conservation laws that PhysicsGuard and ESP enforce.
Music-math integration maps to resonance families (FAMILY.F01). Harmonic patterns ARE seed resonance.
